definitions.zh: 提示与指令是以指令为关键概念的本体边界；PromptTemplate、PromptTemplateInstance、FewShotExample 及其 instantiates 与组成关系。 其成员归属遵循：当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。
definitions.en: Prompts and instructions is the ontology boundary anchored by the key notion instruction; PromptTemplate, PromptTemplateInstance, FewShotExample, and their instantiates and composition relations. Membership follows: Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.
definitions.ja: プロンプトと指示は指示を主要概念とするオントロジー境界です。PromptTemplate、PromptTemplateInstance、FewShotExample、および instantiates/composition relation。 所属判定は次に従います：対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。

purpose.zh: 区分提示规范、实例化提示和具有权威顺序的指令，并记录解析、冲突检测与解决结果。
purpose.en: Distinguish prompt specifications, instantiated prompts, and authority-ordered instructions, recording parsing, conflict detection, and resolution results.
purpose.ja: プロンプト仕様、インスタンス化プロンプト、権威順序を持つ指示を区別し、解析、競合検出、解決結果を記録します。

includes.zh: PromptTemplate、PromptTemplateInstance、FewShotExample 及其 instantiates 与组成关系。
includes.en: PromptTemplate, PromptTemplateInstance, FewShotExample, and their instantiates and composition relations.

includes.zh: 系统、开发者、用户和覆盖指令，指令权威、优先级、作用域、来源，以及解析和解决活动。
includes.en: System, developer, user, and override instructions; instruction authority, priority, scope, source; and parsing and resolution activities.
includes.ja: system、developer、user、override 指示、指示権威、優先度、作用域、出典、解析・解決活動。

excludes.zh: Conversation、Turn、Message 与发送者角色归消息与会话；消息通过 carries 关系承载指令。
excludes.en: Conversation, Turn, Message, and sender roles belong to messages and conversations; messages carry instructions through an explicit relation.
excludes.ja: Conversation、Turn、Message、送信者役割はメッセージと会話に属し、メッセージは明示的関係で指示を運びます。

excludes.zh: InstructionConflict 的威胁含义和安全处置唯一归注入与内容投毒防御；这里引用冲突并记录解析结果。
excludes.en: The threat meaning and security handling of InstructionConflict belong exclusively to injection and content-poisoning defense; this scope references conflicts and records resolution results.
excludes.ja: InstructionConflict の脅威意味と安全処置は注入とコンテンツ汚染防御だけが所有し、ここでは競合を参照して解析結果を記録します。

description.zh: 提示与指令的输入概念族为提示模板实例；责任交接由已接受事实 指令解析活动 —consumes→ 提示模板实例 (InstructionParsingActivity-consumes-PromptTemplateInstance) 明确给出。
description.en: The input families for Prompts and instructions are prompt template instance; the accepted facts Instruction parsing activity —consumes→ prompt template instance (InstructionParsingActivity-consumes-PromptTemplateInstance) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: プロンプトと指示の入力概念族はプロンプトテンプレート実例です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 指示解析活動 —consumes→ プロンプトテンプレート実例 (InstructionParsingActivity-consumes-PromptTemplateInstance) により明示されます。

description.zh: 提示与指令的输出概念族为指令、指令解决结果；责任交接由已接受事实 指令解析活动 —produces→ 指令 (InstructionParsingActivity-produces-Instruction)；指令解决活动 —produces→ 指令解决结果 (InstructionResolutionActivity-produces-InstructionResolution)；指令解决结果 —records_effective→ 指令 (InstructionResolution-records_effective-Instruction) 明确给出。
description.en: The output families for Prompts and instructions are instruction, instruction resolution; the accepted facts Instruction parsing activity —produces→ instruction (InstructionParsingActivity-produces-Instruction); Instruction resolution activity —produces→ instruction resolution (InstructionResolutionActivity-produces-InstructionResolution); instruction resolution —records_effective→ instruction (InstructionResolution-records_effective-Instruction) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: プロンプトと指示の出力概念族は指示、指示解決結果です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 指示解析活動 —produces→ 指示 (InstructionParsingActivity-produces-Instruction)；指示解決活動 —produces→ 指示解決結果 (InstructionResolutionActivity-produces-InstructionResolution)；指示解決結果 —records_effective→ 指示 (InstructionResolution-records_effective-Instruction) により明示されます。

description.zh: 提示与指令的失败概念族为指令冲突；责任交接由已接受事实 指令冲突检测活动 —detects→ 指令冲突 (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict) 明确给出。
description.en: The failure families for Prompts and instructions are instruction conflict; the accepted facts Instruction conflict-detection activity —detects→ instruction conflict (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: プロンプトと指示の失敗概念族は指示衝突です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 指示競合検出活動 —detects→ 指示衝突 (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict) により明示されます。

description.zh: 提示与指令的恢复概念族为指令解决活动；责任交接由已接受事实 指令解决活动 —resolves→ 指令冲突 (InstructionResolutionActivity-resolves-InstructionConflict) 明确给出。
description.en: The recovery families for Prompts and instructions are Instruction resolution activity; the accepted facts Instruction resolution activity —resolves→ instruction conflict (InstructionResolutionActivity-resolves-InstructionConflict) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: プロンプトと指示の回復概念族は指示解決活動です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 指示解決活動 —resolves→ 指示衝突 (InstructionResolutionActivity-resolves-InstructionConflict) により明示されます。

decision_note.zh: 提示与指令与消息与会话按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Prompts and instructions and Messages and conversations are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: プロンプトと指示とメッセージと会話は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 提示与指令与消息与会话按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Prompts and instructions and Messages and conversations are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: プロンプトと指示とメッセージと会話は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.en: Prompts and instructions and Messages and conversations are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.

decision_note.en: Prompts and instructions and Messages and conversations are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.

labels.zh: 某个 PromptTemplateInstance 实例化了哪个模板，变量绑定和内容块是否满足模板约束？：正例
labels.en: Which template does a PromptTemplateInstance instantiate, and do its variable bindings and content blocks satisfy template constraints?: positive case
labels.ja: PromptTemplateInstance はどの template を instantiate し、variable binding と content block は template constraint を満たしますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例以 指令冲突检测活动、音频内容块、指令处理、图像内容块 作边界比较；问题“某个 PromptTemplateInstance 实例化了哪个模板，变量绑定和内容块是否满足模板约束？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
descriptions.en: The positive case compares Instruction conflict-detection activity, audio block, Instruction processing, image block at the ownership boundary. The question “Which template does a PromptTemplateInstance instantiate, and do its variable bindings and content blocks satisfy template constraints?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.
descriptions.ja: 正例は 指示競合検出活動、音声内容ブロック、指示処理、画像内容ブロック を所有境界で比較します。質問「PromptTemplateInstance はどの template を instantiate し、variable binding と content block は template constraint を満たしますか。」は関連オントロジーを境界対照として使いますが、その読みに根拠を与える承認済みの非分類モジュール間関係は canonical グラフにありません。そのため例証は双方の候補概念を並置し、実行時の受け渡しを主張しません。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：The instance points to exactly one compatible template and satisfies every required binding; template and instance retain different semantic kinds.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: The instance points to exactly one compatible template and satisfies every required binding; template and instance retain different semantic kinds.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：The instance points to exactly one compatible template and satisfies every required binding; template and instance retain different semantic kinds.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ info-prompts-instructions-cq-template-instantiation-v3 (info-prompts-instructions.template-instantiation), owned by info-prompts-instructions and compared with info-content-block-modality. The source does not define Moonweave CQ info-prompts-instructions-cq-template-instantiation-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Resolve PromptTemplateInstance instantiates PromptTemplate, then validate required bindings, declared types, and ordered content-block composition." and expected assertion "The instance points to exactly one compatible template and satisfies every required binding; template and instance retain different semantic kinds." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-deepagents-js-docs at Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ info-prompts-instructions-cq-template-instantiation-v3 (info-prompts-instructions.template-instantiation), owned by info-prompts-instructions and compared with info-content-block-modality. The source does not define Moonweave CQ info-prompts-instructions-cq-template-instantiation-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Resolve PromptTemplateInstance instantiates PromptTemplate, then validate required bindings, declared types, and ordered content-block composition." and expected assertion "The instance points to exactly one compatible template and satisfies every required binding; template and instance retain different semantic kinds." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 某个 PromptTemplateInstance 实例化了哪个模板，变量绑定和内容块是否满足模板约束？：反例
labels.en: Which template does a PromptTemplateInstance instantiate, and do its variable bindings and content blocks satisfy template constraints?: counterexample
labels.ja: PromptTemplateInstance はどの template を instantiate し、variable binding と content block は template constraint を満たしますか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“某个 PromptTemplateInstance 实例化了哪个模板，变量绑定和内容块是否满足模板约束？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Which template does a PromptTemplateInstance instantiate, and do its variable bindings and content blocks satisfy template constraints?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「PromptTemplateInstance はどの template を instantiate し、variable binding と content block は template constraint を満たしますか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ info-prompts-instructions-cq-template-instantiation-v3 (info-prompts-instructions.template-instantiation), owned by info-prompts-instructions and compared with info-content-block-modality. The source does not define Moonweave CQ info-prompts-instructions-cq-template-instantiation-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Resolve PromptTemplateInstance instantiates PromptTemplate, then validate required bindings, declared types, and ordered content-block composition." and expected assertion "The instance points to exactly one compatible template and satisfies every required binding; template and instance retain different semantic kinds." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

labels.zh: 相互冲突的系统、开发者、用户和覆盖指令按何种权威、作用域与优先级得到最终解析？：正例
labels.en: How are conflicting system, developer, user, and override instructions resolved by authority, scope, and priority?: positive case
labels.ja: 競合する system、developer、user、override 指示は、権威、作用域、優先度によりどのように最終解決されますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：指令冲突检测活动 —detects→ 指令冲突 (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: Instruction conflict-detection activity —detects→ instruction conflict (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：指示競合検出活動 —detects→ 指示衝突 (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：The resolution cites all applicable instructions, returns one governed outcome or explicit unresolved state, and does not redefine the security conflict.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: The resolution cites all applicable instructions, returns one governed outcome or explicit unresolved state, and does not redefine the security conflict.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：The resolution cites all applicable instructions, returns one governed outcome or explicit unresolved state, and does not redefine the security conflict.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ info-prompts-instructions-cq-authority-resolution-v3 (info-prompts-instructions.authority-resolution), owned by info-prompts-instructions and compared with safety-injection-defense. The source does not define Moonweave CQ info-prompts-instructions-cq-authority-resolution-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Order applicable Instruction values by authority policy, scope containment, and priority; reference any safety-owned InstructionConflict." and expected assertion "The resolution cites all applicable instructions, returns one governed outcome or explicit unresolved state, and does not redefine the security conflict." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.

labels.zh: 一条消息承载了哪些指令或提示内容，哪些普通内容块不产生规范约束？：正例
labels.en: Which instructions or prompt content does a message carry, and which ordinary content blocks create no normative constraint?: positive case
labels.ja: メッセージはどの指示またはプロンプト内容を運び、どの通常内容ブロックは規範制約を生みませんか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：消息 —carries_instruction→ 指令 (Message-carries_instruction-Instruction)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: message —carries_instruction→ instruction (Message-carries_instruction-Instruction).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：メッセージ —carries_instruction→ 指示 (Message-carries_instruction-Instruction)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Only explicitly identified normative content is returned as Instruction; ordinary message content remains ContentBlock even when text is imperative.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Only explicitly identified normative content is returned as Instruction; ordinary message content remains ContentBlock even when text is imperative.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Only explicitly identified normative content is returned as Instruction; ordinary message content remains ContentBlock even when text is imperative.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。

labels.zh: 一条消息承载了哪些指令或提示内容，哪些普通内容块不产生规范约束？：反例
labels.en: Which instructions or prompt content does a message carry, and which ordinary content blocks create no normative constraint?: counterexample
labels.ja: メッセージはどの指示またはプロンプト内容を運び、どの通常内容ブロックは規範制約を生みませんか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“一条消息承载了哪些指令或提示内容，哪些普通内容块不产生规范约束？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Which instructions or prompt content does a message carry, and which ordinary content blocks create no normative constraint?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「メッセージはどの指示またはプロンプト内容を運び、どの通常内容ブロックは規範制約を生みませんか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

competency_questions.query: Resolve PromptTemplateInstance instantiates PromptTemplate, then validate required bindings, declared types, and ordered content-block composition.

owns_when.zh: 当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。
owns_when.en: Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.
owns_when.ja: 対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。

references_when.zh: 消息、运行或安全分析需要说明采用了哪个提示实例或哪条已解析指令时，引用这里的规范对象和解决结果。
references_when.en: Messages, runtime, or security analysis references specification objects and resolution results here when identifying a prompt instance or resolved instruction in use.
references_when.ja: メッセージ、実行、安全分析が使用したプロンプトインスタンスまたは解決済み指示を示すとき、ここで定義した仕様対象と解決結果を参照します。

rationale.zh: 提示与指令拥有模板、实例化、规范作用与权威解决；消息与会话拥有承载这些内容的发言位置和包络。 本条仅记录 Message；其 canonical owner 是消息与会话（info-messages-instructions），因此 info-prompts-instructions 在此引用这些概念。
rationale.en: Prompts and instructions own templates, instantiation, normative effect, and authority resolution; messages and conversations own the utterance positions and envelopes carrying that content. This record is limited to Message; their canonical owner is Messages and conversations (info-messages-instructions), so info-prompts-instructions references these concepts here.
rationale.ja: プロンプトと指示はテンプレート、インスタンス化、規範作用、権威解決を所有し、メッセージと会話はそれらを運ぶ発話位置と包絡を所有します。 この記録は Message だけを対象とし、canonical owner はメッセージと会話（info-messages-instructions）です。したがって info-prompts-instructions はここでこれらを参照します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used to compare info-prompts-instructions with info-messages-instructions, including Message. The source does not define Moonweave Modules info-prompts-instructions or info-messages-instructions, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under info-prompts-instructions's owns_when "Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "If changing dialogue position preserves template bindings and normative effect, it belongs to prompts and instructions; if changing sender or turn changes identity, it belongs to messages and conversations."; result=references and owner=info-messages-instructions are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

decision_note.zh: 提示与指令拥有正常 Instruction 的解析、authority 比较和非恶意冲突解决；注入与污染防御拥有 ThreatSignal、Taint、恶意冲突判断和缓解。 本条仅记录 InstructionConflict、PromptInjectionSignal；其 canonical owner 是注入与内容投毒防御（safety-injection-defense），因此 info-prompts-instructions 在此引用这些概念。
decision_note.en: Prompts and instructions own parsing, authority comparison, and nonmalicious conflict resolution for normal Instruction; injection and poisoning defense owns ThreatSignal, Taint, malicious-conflict judgment, and mitigation. This record is limited to InstructionConflict, PromptInjectionSignal; their canonical owner is Injection and content-poisoning defense (safety-injection-defense), so info-prompts-instructions references these concepts here.

semantic_area.ja: プロンプトインスタンスとメッセージテキスト

overlap_reason.zh: 同一文本可能从模板实例化后放入消息，但实例化身份依赖模板和绑定，消息身份依赖会话和发送者。 本条仅记录 Message、MessageHistory；其 canonical owner 是消息与会话（info-messages-instructions），因此 info-prompts-instructions 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: The same text may be instantiated from a template and placed in a message, but instantiation identity depends on template and bindings while message identity depends on conversation and sender. This record is limited to Message, MessageHistory; their canonical owner is Messages and conversations (info-messages-instructions), so info-prompts-instructions references these concepts here.

disambiguation_test.zh: 若替换会话位置仍保持同一模板绑定和规范作用，则归提示与指令；若替换发送者或轮次即改变身份，则归消息与会话。

overlap_reason.zh: 权限不同的合法指令可能冲突而没有攻击；只有带不可信来源、越权意图或污染证据的冲突进入安全防御。 本条仅记录 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity、InstructionResolution；其 canonical owner 是提示与指令（info-prompts-instructions），因此 info-prompts-instructions 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Legitimate instructions of different authority can conflict without attack; only conflicts with untrusted source, privilege-escalation intent, or poisoning evidence enter security defense. This record is limited to InstructionConflictDetectionActivity, InstructionResolution; their canonical owner is Prompts and instructions (info-prompts-instructions), so info-prompts-instructions owns these concepts here.

overlap_reason.zh: 权限不同的合法指令可能冲突而没有攻击；只有带不可信来源、越权意图或污染证据的冲突进入安全防御。 本条仅记录 InstructionConflict、PromptInjectionSignal；其 canonical owner 是注入与内容投毒防御（safety-injection-defense），因此 info-prompts-instructions 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Legitimate instructions of different authority can conflict without attack; only conflicts with untrusted source, privilege-escalation intent, or poisoning evidence enter security defense. This record is limited to InstructionConflict, PromptInjectionSignal; their canonical owner is Injection and content-poisoning defense (safety-injection-defense), so info-prompts-instructions references these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: authority の異なる正当 instruction は攻撃なしでも conflict し得て、untrusted source・privilege escalation intent・poisoning evidence がある場合だけ security defense に入ります。 この記録は InstructionConflict、PromptInjectionSignal だけを対象とし、canonical owner は注入とコンテンツ汚染防御（safety-injection-defense）です。したがって info-prompts-instructions はここでこれらを参照します。

disambiguation_test.zh: 仅靠 authority、priority 和 applicability 可解决的对象归提示与指令；需要 threat classification、taint flow 或 mitigation 的对象归注入与污染防御。
disambiguation_test.en: An object resolvable by authority, priority, and applicability alone belongs to prompts and instructions; one requiring threat classification, taint flow, or mitigation belongs to injection and poisoning defense.
disambiguation_test.ja: authority・priority・applicability だけで解決できれば prompt/instruction、threat classification・taint flow・mitigation が必要なら injection/poisoning defense に属します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-proto-mcp-spec at Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features supports operational notions used to compare info-prompts-instructions with safety-injection-defense, including InstructionConflict, PromptInjectionSignal. The source does not define Moonweave Modules info-prompts-instructions or safety-injection-defense, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under info-prompts-instructions's owns_when "Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "An object resolvable by authority, priority, and applicability alone belongs to prompts and instructions; one requiring threat classification, taint flow, or mitigation belongs to injection and poisoning defense."; result=distinct and owner=safety-injection-defense are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

short_definitions.zh: 少样本示例是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它保存用于条件化行为的输入输出样例或演示模式，并作为可追溯上下文内容进入提示。
short_definitions.en: As an information record, Few-shot example is distinguished by the fact that it stores an example input-output or demonstration pattern used to condition behavior while remaining traceable as context content.
short_definitions.ja: 情報記録に属する少数例デモは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、振る舞いを条件付ける入出力例または実演パターンを保存し、追跡可能なコンテキスト内容としてプロンプトに入ります。

definitions.zh: 少样本示例是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它保存用于条件化行为的输入输出样例或演示模式，并作为可追溯上下文内容进入提示。
definitions.en: As an information record, Few-shot example is distinguished by the fact that it stores an example input-output or demonstration pattern used to condition behavior while remaining traceable as context content.
definitions.ja: 情報記録に属する少数例デモは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、振る舞いを条件付ける入出力例または実演パターンを保存し、追跡可能なコンテキスト内容としてプロンプトに入ります。

why_needed.zh: 少样本示例为canonical 事实 ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample（ContextPackage contains FewShotExample）提供明确端点并保持与 ContextPackage 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: few-shot example provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample (ContextPackage contains FewShotExample) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ContextPackage.
why_needed.ja: 少数例デモはcanonical 事実 ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample（ContextPackage contains FewShotExample）の明確な端点を提供し、ContextPackage との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的少样本示例：少样本示例是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它保存用于条件化行为的输入输出样例或演示模式，并作为可追溯上下文内容进入提示。；该种差可由关系 ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes few-shot example records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As an information record, Few-shot example is distinguished by the fact that it stores an example input-output or demonstration pattern used to condition behavior while remaining traceable as context content. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす少数例デモを含みます：情報記録に属する少数例デモは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、振る舞いを条件付ける入出力例または実演パターンを保存し、追跡可能なコンテキスト内容としてプロンプトに入ります。 種差は関係 ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 上下文包只是关系 ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample 的另一端；相关联不表示它是少样本示例。
excludes.en: ContextPackage is only the other endpoint of ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample; relatedness does not make it a FewShotExample.
excludes.ja: ContextPackage は ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで FewShotExample にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次多模态助手的上下文准备运行中，系统将少样本示例（FewShotExample）记录为 ContextPackage contains FewShotExample 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“少样本示例是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它保存用于条件化行为的输入输出样例或演示模式，并作为可追溯上下文内容进入提示”。
descriptions.en: During a multimodal assistant run for context preparation, the system records few-shot example (FewShotExample) as the target of ContextPackage contains FewShotExample. Its reviewed definition is “As an information record, Few-shot example is distinguished by the fact that it stores an example input-output or demonstration pattern used to condition behavior while remaining traceable as context content”.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムは少数例デモ（FewShotExample）を ContextPackage contains FewShotExample の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「情報記録に属する少数例デモは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、振る舞いを条件付ける入出力例または実演パターンを保存し、追跡可能なコンテキスト内容としてプロンプトに入ります」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 FewShotExample 以及方向保持不变的事实 ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample。
expected_result.en: The run can query FewShotExample together with direction-preserving fact ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample.
expected_result.ja: この実行では FewShotExample と方向を保持した事実 ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: ContextPackage 用作FewShotExample的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 ContextPackage 的已审查定义是“作为信息记录，上下文包由这一事实区分：它表示一次模型调用或智能体步骤实际可见的消息包络、指令、内容块、来源引用、检索候选、工具观测、引用、排除项和预算元数据。”。不能因 relation ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample 而把它归入FewShotExample。
descriptions.en: ContextPackage is the boundary contrast for FewShotExample. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but ContextPackage's reviewed definition is “Context package belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it is a bundles the exact message envelopes, instructions, content blocks, source references, retrieval candidates, tool observations, citations, exclusions, and budget metadata visible to one model call or agent step.”. relation ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample does not make it a FewShotExample.
descriptions.ja: ContextPackage は FewShotExample の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、ContextPackage の審査済み定義は「コンテキストパッケージは情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、単一のモデル呼び出しまたはエージェント手順が実際に参照するメッセージ包絡、指示、内容ブロック、出典参照、検索候補、ツール観測、引用、除外項目、予算メタデータをまとめます。」です。relation ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample だけで FewShotExample にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: ContextPackage 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 FewShotExample。
expected_result.en: ContextPackage retains its own type; validation must not promote it to FewShotExample from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: ContextPackage は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで FewShotExample へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、ContextPackage-contains-FewShotExample の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 FewShotExample（少样本示例）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms FewShotExample (few-shot example) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は FewShotExample（少数例デモ）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 FewShotExample 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 PromptTemplate-contains-FewShotExample，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=PromptTemplate-contains-FewShotExample；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms FewShotExample has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone PromptTemplate-contains-FewShotExample, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=PromptTemplate-contains-FewShotExample; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は FewShotExample の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が PromptTemplate-contains-FewShotExample であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=PromptTemplate-contains-FewShotExample、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: FewShotExample 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for FewShotExample were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: FewShotExample の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 少样本示例已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: few-shot example was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 少数例デモは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 指令属于规范，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它记录约束智能体行为的规范性内容，并携带权威、作用域、优先级、来源和冲突解决元数据。
short_definitions.en: Instruction is a specification whose defining condition is that it records a directive that constrains agent behavior and carries authority, scope, priority, provenance, and conflict-resolution metadata.

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的指令：指令属于规范，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它记录约束智能体行为的规范性内容，并携带权威、作用域、优先级、来源和冲突解决元数据。；该种差可由字段 priority 检验。

Its reviewed definition is “Instruction is a specification whose defining condition is that it records a directive that constrains agent behavior and carries authority, scope, priority, provenance, and conflict-resolution metadata”. The record also binds reviewed fields priority=10.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムは指示（Instruction）を Instruction has_instruction_authority InstructionAuthority の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「指示は仕様のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、エージェントの振る舞いを制約する規範的内容を記録し、権威、適用範囲、優先度、出典、衝突解決のメタデータを持ちます」です。記録には審査済み項目 priority=10 も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 Instruction 以及方向保持不变的事实 has_instruction_authority。
expected_result.en: The run can query Instruction together with direction-preserving fact has_instruction_authority.

descriptions.zh: InstructionAuthority 用作Instruction的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 InstructionAuthority 的已审查定义是“指令权威是以如下事实为区分特征的指令元数据：它说明指令的权威层级和来源，用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令之间的冲突。”。不能因 relation has_instruction_authority 而把它归入Instruction。
descriptions.en: InstructionAuthority is the boundary contrast for Instruction. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but InstructionAuthority's reviewed definition is “Instruction authority is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it states the authority level and source of an instruction so conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives can be resolved.”. relation has_instruction_authority does not make it a Instruction.
descriptions.ja: InstructionAuthority は Instruction の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、InstructionAuthority の審査済み定義は「指示権限は指示メタデータの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：指示権威は、指示の権威レベルと出典を示し、システム、開発者、ユーザー、方針、検索内容、ツール由来の指示間の衝突解決に使われます。」です。relation has_instruction_authority だけで Instruction にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: InstructionAuthority 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 Instruction。
expected_result.en: InstructionAuthority retains its own type; validation must not promote it to Instruction from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: InstructionAuthority は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで Instruction へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 has_instruction_authority 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of has_instruction_authority; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、has_instruction_authority の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 Instruction（指令）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms Instruction (instruction) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は Instruction（指示）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 Instruction 的 semantic kind 为 specification，主父或骨架为 reviewed root module-key-root，并满足“semantic kind=specification；backbone=root_status=module-key-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Instruction has semantic kind specification, primary parent or backbone reviewed root module-key-root, and invariants “semantic kind=specification; backbone=root_status=module-key-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は Instruction の semantic kind が specification、主親または骨格が reviewed root module-key-root であり、「semantic kind=specification、backbone=root_status=module-key-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: Instruction 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for Instruction were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: Instruction の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 指令已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: instruction was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 指示は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 作为指令元数据，指令适用性由这一事实区分：它说明某条指令在上下文包或智能体步骤中何时处于启用、停用、继承或受限状态。
short_definitions.en: Instruction applicability belongs to the instruction metadata category and differs from broader members in that it states the conditions under which an instruction is active, inactive, inherited, or limited for a context package or agent step.
short_definitions.ja: 指示適用性は指示メタデータとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ある指示がコンテキストパッケージまたはエージェント手順で有効、無効、継承、限定のいずれであるかを示します。

definitions.zh: 作为指令元数据，指令适用性由这一事实区分：它说明某条指令在上下文包或智能体步骤中何时处于启用、停用、继承或受限状态。
definitions.en: Instruction applicability belongs to the instruction metadata category and differs from broader members in that it states the conditions under which an instruction is active, inactive, inherited, or limited for a context package or agent step.
definitions.ja: 指示適用性は指示メタデータとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ある指示がコンテキストパッケージまたはエージェント手順で有効、無効、継承、限定のいずれであるかを示します。

why_needed.zh: 指令适用性为canonical 事实 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata（InstructionApplicability is_a InstructionMetadata）提供明确端点并保持与 InstructionAuthority 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: instruction applicability provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata (InstructionApplicability is_a InstructionMetadata) while preserving its reviewed boundary from InstructionAuthority.
why_needed.ja: 指示適用性はcanonical 事実 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata（InstructionApplicability is_a InstructionMetadata）の明確な端点を提供し、InstructionAuthority との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的指令适用性：作为指令元数据，指令适用性由这一事实区分：它说明某条指令在上下文包或智能体步骤中何时处于启用、停用、继承或受限状态。；该种差可由关系 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes instruction applicability records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Instruction applicability belongs to the instruction metadata category and differs from broader members in that it states the conditions under which an instruction is active, inactive, inherited, or limited for a context package or agent step. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす指示適用性を含みます：指示適用性は指示メタデータとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ある指示がコンテキストパッケージまたはエージェント手順で有効、無効、継承、限定のいずれであるかを示します。 種差は関係 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 指令权威虽与本概念同属 InstructionMetadata，但其定义为“指令权威是以如下事实为区分特征的指令元数据：它说明指令的权威层级和来源，用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令之间的冲突。”，不得替代指令适用性。
excludes.en: InstructionAuthority shares parent InstructionMetadata, but its reviewed definition is “Instruction authority is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it states the authority level and source of an instruction so conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives can be resolved.”; it must not be substituted for InstructionApplicability.
excludes.ja: InstructionAuthority は同じ上位 InstructionMetadata を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「指示権限は指示メタデータの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：指示権威は、指示の権威レベルと出典を示し、システム、開発者、ユーザー、方針、検索内容、ツール由来の指示間の衝突解決に使われます。」であり、InstructionApplicability の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次多模态助手的上下文准备运行中，系统将指令适用性（InstructionApplicability）记录为 InstructionApplicability is_a InstructionMetadata 的源端点。其已审查定义是“作为指令元数据，指令适用性由这一事实区分：它说明某条指令在上下文包或智能体步骤中何时处于启用、停用、继承或受限状态”。
descriptions.en: During a multimodal assistant run for context preparation, the system records instruction applicability (InstructionApplicability) as the source of InstructionApplicability is_a InstructionMetadata. Its reviewed definition is “Instruction applicability belongs to the instruction metadata category and differs from broader members in that it states the conditions under which an instruction is active, inactive, inherited, or limited for a context package or agent step”.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムは指示適用性（InstructionApplicability）を InstructionApplicability is_a InstructionMetadata の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「指示適用性は指示メタデータとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ある指示がコンテキストパッケージまたはエージェント手順で有効、無効、継承、限定のいずれであるかを示します」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 InstructionApplicability 以及方向保持不变的事实 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata。
expected_result.en: The run can query InstructionApplicability together with direction-preserving fact InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata.
expected_result.ja: この実行では InstructionApplicability と方向を保持した事実 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。

decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms InstructionApplicability has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=root_status=composition-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は InstructionApplicability の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=root_status=composition-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: InstructionApplicability 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for InstructionApplicability were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: InstructionApplicability の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 指令适用性已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: instruction applicability was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 指示適用性は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 正向身份比较：父节点 InstructionMetadata：InstructionApplicability（semantic kind=information，骨架 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata）；InstructionAuthority（semantic kind=information，骨架 InstructionAuthority-is_a-InstructionMetadata）。双端条件：InstructionApplicability 条件：“作为指令元数据，指令适用性由这一事实区分：它说明某条指令在上下文包或智能体步骤中何时处于启用、停用、继承或受限状态”；InstructionAuthority 条件：“指令权威是以如下事实为区分特征的指令元数据：它说明指令的权威层级和来源，用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令之间的冲突”。仅依据各自定义与骨架逐端验证。
differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent InstructionMetadata: InstructionApplicability (semantic kind=information, backbone InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata); InstructionAuthority (semantic kind=information, backbone InstructionAuthority-is_a-InstructionMetadata). Endpoint conditions: InstructionApplicability condition: “Instruction applicability belongs to the instruction metadata category and differs from broader members in that it states the conditions under which an instruction is active, inactive, inherited, or limited for a context package or agent step”; InstructionAuthority condition: “Instruction authority is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it states the authority level and source of an instruction so conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives can be resolved”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 InstructionMetadata：InstructionApplicability（semantic kind=information、バックボーン InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata）；InstructionAuthority（semantic kind=information、バックボーン InstructionAuthority-is_a-InstructionMetadata）。両端条件：InstructionApplicability の条件：「指示適用性は指示メタデータとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ある指示がコンテキストパッケージまたはエージェント手順で有効、無効、継承、限定のいずれであるかを示します」；InstructionAuthority の条件：「指示権限は指示メタデータの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：指示権威は、指示の権威レベルと出典を示し、システム、開発者、ユーザー、方針、検索内容、ツール由来の指示間の衝突解決に使われます」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

short_definitions.zh: 指令权威是以如下事实为区分特征的指令元数据：它说明指令的权威层级和来源，用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令之间的冲突。
short_definitions.en: Instruction authority is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it states the authority level and source of an instruction so conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives can be resolved.
short_definitions.ja: 指示権限は指示メタデータの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：指示権威は、指示の権威レベルと出典を示し、システム、開発者、ユーザー、方針、検索内容、ツール由来の指示間の衝突解決に使われます。

definitions.zh: 指令权威是以如下事实为区分特征的指令元数据：它说明指令的权威层级和来源，用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令之间的冲突。
definitions.en: Instruction authority is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it states the authority level and source of an instruction so conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives can be resolved.
definitions.ja: 指示権限は指示メタデータの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：指示権威は、指示の権威レベルと出典を示し、システム、開発者、ユーザー、方針、検索内容、ツール由来の指示間の衝突解決に使われます。

why_needed.zh: 指令权威为canonical 事实 has_instruction_authority（Instruction has_instruction_authority InstructionAuthority）提供明确端点并保持与 InstructionApplicability 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: instruction authority provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact has_instruction_authority (Instruction has_instruction_authority InstructionAuthority) while preserving its reviewed boundary from InstructionApplicability.
why_needed.ja: 指示権限はcanonical 事実 has_instruction_authority（Instruction has_instruction_authority InstructionAuthority）の明確な端点を提供し、InstructionApplicability との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的指令权威：指令权威是以如下事实为区分特征的指令元数据：它说明指令的权威层级和来源，用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令之间的冲突。；该种差可由关系 has_instruction_authority 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes instruction authority records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Instruction authority is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it states the authority level and source of an instruction so conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives can be resolved. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in has_instruction_authority.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす指示権限を含みます：指示権限は指示メタデータの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：指示権威は、指示の権威レベルと出典を示し、システム、開発者、ユーザー、方針、検索内容、ツール由来の指示間の衝突解決に使われます。 種差は関係 has_instruction_authority の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 指令适用性虽与本概念同属 InstructionMetadata，但其定义为“作为指令元数据，指令适用性由这一事实区分：它说明某条指令在上下文包或智能体步骤中何时处于启用、停用、继承或受限状态。”，不得替代指令权威。
excludes.en: InstructionApplicability shares parent InstructionMetadata, but its reviewed definition is “Instruction applicability belongs to the instruction metadata category and differs from broader members in that it states the conditions under which an instruction is active, inactive, inherited, or limited for a context package or agent step.”; it must not be substituted for InstructionAuthority.
excludes.ja: InstructionApplicability は同じ上位 InstructionMetadata を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「指示適用性は指示メタデータとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ある指示がコンテキストパッケージまたはエージェント手順で有効、無効、継承、限定のいずれであるかを示します。」であり、InstructionAuthority の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次多模态助手的上下文准备运行中，系统将指令权威（InstructionAuthority）记录为 Instruction has_instruction_authority InstructionAuthority 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“指令权威是以如下事实为区分特征的指令元数据：它说明指令的权威层级和来源，用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令之间的冲突”。
descriptions.en: During a multimodal assistant run for context preparation, the system records instruction authority (InstructionAuthority) as the target of Instruction has_instruction_authority InstructionAuthority. Its reviewed definition is “Instruction authority is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it states the authority level and source of an instruction so conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives can be resolved”.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムは指示権限（InstructionAuthority）を Instruction has_instruction_authority InstructionAuthority の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「指示権限は指示メタデータの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：指示権威は、指示の権威レベルと出典を示し、システム、開発者、ユーザー、方針、検索内容、ツール由来の指示間の衝突解決に使われます」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 InstructionAuthority 以及方向保持不变的事实 has_instruction_authority。
expected_result.en: The run can query InstructionAuthority together with direction-preserving fact has_instruction_authority.
expected_result.ja: この実行では InstructionAuthority と方向を保持した事実 has_instruction_authority を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、has_instruction_authority 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of has_instruction_authority, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、has_instruction_authority の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: InstructionApplicability 用作InstructionAuthority的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 InstructionApplicability 的已审查定义是“作为指令元数据，指令适用性由这一事实区分：它说明某条指令在上下文包或智能体步骤中何时处于启用、停用、继承或受限状态。”。不能因 shared parent InstructionMetadata 而把它归入InstructionAuthority。
descriptions.en: InstructionApplicability is the boundary contrast for InstructionAuthority. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but InstructionApplicability's reviewed definition is “Instruction applicability belongs to the instruction metadata category and differs from broader members in that it states the conditions under which an instruction is active, inactive, inherited, or limited for a context package or agent step.”. shared parent InstructionMetadata does not make it a InstructionAuthority.
descriptions.ja: InstructionApplicability は InstructionAuthority の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、InstructionApplicability の審査済み定義は「指示適用性は指示メタデータとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ある指示がコンテキストパッケージまたはエージェント手順で有効、無効、継承、限定のいずれであるかを示します。」です。shared parent InstructionMetadata だけで InstructionAuthority にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: InstructionApplicability 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 InstructionAuthority。
expected_result.en: InstructionApplicability retains its own type; validation must not promote it to InstructionAuthority from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: InstructionApplicability は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで InstructionAuthority へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 has_instruction_authority 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of has_instruction_authority; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、has_instruction_authority の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

differentia.zh: 端点特定对照：父节点 InstructionMetadata：InstructionAuthority（semantic kind=information，骨架 InstructionAuthority-is_a-InstructionMetadata）；InstructionPriority（semantic kind=information，骨架 InstructionPriority-is_a-InstructionMetadata）。双端条件：InstructionAuthority 条件：“指令权威是以如下事实为区分特征的指令元数据：它说明指令的权威层级和来源，用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令之间的冲突”；InstructionPriority 条件：“指令优先级是一种指令元数据；其区分条件是：它记录多个适用指令竞争控制某次模型调用或智能体步骤时采用的先后顺序”。条件不得互借；各自成立后方可归类。
differentia.en: Endpoint-specific contrast: parent InstructionMetadata: InstructionAuthority (semantic kind=information, backbone InstructionAuthority-is_a-InstructionMetadata); InstructionPriority (semantic kind=information, backbone InstructionPriority-is_a-InstructionMetadata). Endpoint conditions: InstructionAuthority condition: “Instruction authority is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it states the authority level and source of an instruction so conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives can be resolved”; InstructionPriority condition: “As an instruction metadata, Instruction priority is distinguished by the fact that it records the precedence ordering used when multiple applicable instructions compete for control of a model call or agent step”. Conditions cannot be borrowed; classify each endpoint only from its own evidence.

differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent InstructionMetadata: InstructionAuthority (semantic kind=information, backbone InstructionAuthority-is_a-InstructionMetadata); InstructionProvenance (semantic kind=information, backbone InstructionProvenance-is_a-InstructionMetadata). Endpoint conditions: InstructionAuthority condition: “Instruction authority is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it states the authority level and source of an instruction so conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives can be resolved”; InstructionProvenance condition: “Instruction provenance is an instruction metadata; its differentiating condition is that it links an instruction to its source message, policy, prompt template, retrieved artifact, protocol envelope, or human approval record”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 InstructionMetadata：InstructionAuthority（semantic kind=information、バックボーン InstructionAuthority-is_a-InstructionMetadata）；InstructionProvenance（semantic kind=information、バックボーン InstructionProvenance-is_a-InstructionMetadata）。両端条件：InstructionAuthority の条件：「指示権限は指示メタデータの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：指示権威は、指示の権威レベルと出典を示し、システム、開発者、ユーザー、方針、検索内容、ツール由来の指示間の衝突解決に使われます」；InstructionProvenance の条件：「指示来歴は指示メタデータの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、指示を出典メッセージ、方針、プロンプトテンプレート、検索成果物、プロトコル包絡、人間の承認記録へ結び付けます」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

short_definitions.zh: 指令冲突检测活动是一种指令处理；其区分条件是：它比较已解析指令的权威性、优先级、作用域和内容，并引用安全域的冲突记录。
short_definitions.en: As an Instruction processing, Instruction conflict-detection activity is distinguished by the fact that it compares authority, priority, scope, and content of parsed instructions and references safety-owned conflict records.
short_definitions.ja: 指示処理に属する指示競合検出活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは解析済み指示の権威、優先度、スコープ、内容を比較し、安全領域所有の競合記録を参照します。

definitions.zh: 指令冲突检测活动是一种指令处理；其区分条件是：它比较已解析指令的权威性、优先级、作用域和内容，并引用安全域的冲突记录。
definitions.en: As an Instruction processing, Instruction conflict-detection activity is distinguished by the fact that it compares authority, priority, scope, and content of parsed instructions and references safety-owned conflict records.
definitions.ja: 指示処理に属する指示競合検出活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは解析済み指示の権威、優先度、スコープ、内容を比較し、安全領域所有の競合記録を参照します。

why_needed.zh: 指令冲突检测活动为canonical 事实 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict（InstructionConflictDetectionActivity detects InstructionConflict）提供明确端点并保持与 InstructionParsingActivity 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Instruction conflict-detection activity provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity detects InstructionConflict) while preserving its reviewed boundary from InstructionParsingActivity.
why_needed.ja: 指示競合検出活動はcanonical 事実 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict（InstructionConflictDetectionActivity detects InstructionConflict）の明確な端点を提供し、InstructionParsingActivity との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的指令冲突检测活动：指令冲突检测活动是一种指令处理；其区分条件是：它比较已解析指令的权威性、优先级、作用域和内容，并引用安全域的冲突记录。；该种差可由关系 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Instruction conflict-detection activity records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As an Instruction processing, Instruction conflict-detection activity is distinguished by the fact that it compares authority, priority, scope, and content of parsed instructions and references safety-owned conflict records. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす指示競合検出活動を含みます：指示処理に属する指示競合検出活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは解析済み指示の権威、優先度、スコープ、内容を比較し、安全領域所有の競合記録を参照します。 種差は関係 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 指令解析活动虽与本概念同属 InstructionProcessing，但其定义为“指令解析活动是以如下事实为区分特征的指令处理：它识别提示实例中的指令边界、角色来源和元数据，不负责冲突裁决。”，不得替代指令冲突检测活动。
excludes.en: InstructionParsingActivity shares parent InstructionProcessing, but its reviewed definition is “Instruction parsing activity is an Instruction processing; its differentiating condition is that it identifies instruction boundaries, role provenance, and metadata in a prompt instance without resolving conflicts.”; it must not be substituted for InstructionConflictDetectionActivity.
excludes.ja: InstructionParsingActivity は同じ上位 InstructionProcessing を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「指示解析活動は指示処理の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それはプロンプト実例内の指示境界、役割出典、メタデータを識別し、競合解決は行いません。」であり、InstructionConflictDetectionActivity の代用にはできません。

differentia.zh: 端点特定对照：父节点 InstructionProcessing：InstructionConflictDetectionActivity（semantic kind=activity，骨架 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing）；InstructionParsingActivity（semantic kind=activity，骨架 InstructionParsingActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing）。双端条件：InstructionConflictDetectionActivity 条件：“指令冲突检测活动是一种指令处理；其区分条件是：它比较已解析指令的权威性、优先级、作用域和内容，并引用安全域的冲突记录”；InstructionParsingActivity 条件：“指令解析活动是以如下事实为区分特征的指令处理：它识别提示实例中的指令边界、角色来源和元数据，不负责冲突裁决”。条件不得互借；各自成立后方可归类。
differentia.en: Endpoint-specific contrast: parent InstructionProcessing: InstructionConflictDetectionActivity (semantic kind=activity, backbone InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing); InstructionParsingActivity (semantic kind=activity, backbone InstructionParsingActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing). Endpoint conditions: InstructionConflictDetectionActivity condition: “As an Instruction processing, Instruction conflict-detection activity is distinguished by the fact that it compares authority, priority, scope, and content of parsed instructions and references safety-owned conflict records”; InstructionParsingActivity condition: “Instruction parsing activity is an Instruction processing; its differentiating condition is that it identifies instruction boundaries, role provenance, and metadata in a prompt instance without resolving conflicts”. Conditions cannot be borrowed; classify each endpoint only from its own evidence.
differentia.ja: 端点別対照：親 InstructionProcessing：InstructionConflictDetectionActivity（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing）；InstructionParsingActivity（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン InstructionParsingActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing）。両端条件：InstructionConflictDetectionActivity の条件：「指示処理に属する指示競合検出活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは解析済み指示の権威、優先度、スコープ、内容を比較し、安全領域所有の競合記録を参照します」；InstructionParsingActivity の条件：「指示解析活動は指示処理の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それはプロンプト実例内の指示境界、役割出典、メタデータを識別し、競合解決は行いません」。条件を流用せず、各端を固有の証拠で分類します。

labels.zh: 指令冲突检测活动正例
labels.en: Positive example of Instruction conflict-detection activity
labels.ja: 指示競合検出活動の正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次多模态助手的上下文准备运行中，系统将指令冲突检测活动（InstructionConflictDetectionActivity）记录为 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity detects InstructionConflict 的源端点。其已审查定义是“指令冲突检测活动是一种指令处理；其区分条件是：它比较已解析指令的权威性、优先级、作用域和内容，并引用安全域的冲突记录”。
descriptions.en: During a multimodal assistant run for context preparation, the system records Instruction conflict-detection activity (InstructionConflictDetectionActivity) as the source of InstructionConflictDetectionActivity detects InstructionConflict. Its reviewed definition is “As an Instruction processing, Instruction conflict-detection activity is distinguished by the fact that it compares authority, priority, scope, and content of parsed instructions and references safety-owned conflict records”.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムは指示競合検出活動（InstructionConflictDetectionActivity）を InstructionConflictDetectionActivity detects InstructionConflict の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「指示処理に属する指示競合検出活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは解析済み指示の権威、優先度、スコープ、内容を比較し、安全領域所有の競合記録を参照します」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity 以及方向保持不变的事实 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict。
expected_result.en: The run can query InstructionConflictDetectionActivity together with direction-preserving fact InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict.
expected_result.ja: この実行では InstructionConflictDetectionActivity と方向を保持した事実 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.zh: 指令冲突检测活动边界例
labels.en: Boundary case for Instruction conflict-detection activity
labels.ja: 指示競合検出活動の境界例

descriptions.zh: InstructionParsingActivity 用作InstructionConflictDetectionActivity的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 InstructionParsingActivity 的已审查定义是“指令解析活动是以如下事实为区分特征的指令处理：它识别提示实例中的指令边界、角色来源和元数据，不负责冲突裁决。”。不能因 shared parent InstructionProcessing 而把它归入InstructionConflictDetectionActivity。
descriptions.en: InstructionParsingActivity is the boundary contrast for InstructionConflictDetectionActivity. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but InstructionParsingActivity's reviewed definition is “Instruction parsing activity is an Instruction processing; its differentiating condition is that it identifies instruction boundaries, role provenance, and metadata in a prompt instance without resolving conflicts.”. shared parent InstructionProcessing does not make it a InstructionConflictDetectionActivity.
descriptions.ja: InstructionParsingActivity は InstructionConflictDetectionActivity の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、InstructionParsingActivity の審査済み定義は「指示解析活動は指示処理の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それはプロンプト実例内の指示境界、役割出典、メタデータを識別し、競合解決は行いません。」です。shared parent InstructionProcessing だけで InstructionConflictDetectionActivity にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: InstructionParsingActivity 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity。
expected_result.en: InstructionParsingActivity retains its own type; validation must not promote it to InstructionConflictDetectionActivity from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: InstructionParsingActivity は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで InstructionConflictDetectionActivity へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-detects-InstructionConflict の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity（指令冲突检测活动）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionConflictDetectionActivity (Instruction conflict-detection activity) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionConflictDetectionActivity（指示競合検出活動）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity 的 semantic kind 为 activity，主父或骨架为 InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing，并满足“semantic kind=activity；backbone=InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms InstructionConflictDetectionActivity has semantic kind activity, primary parent or backbone InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing, and invariants “semantic kind=activity; backbone=InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は InstructionConflictDetectionActivity の semantic kind が activity、主親または骨格が InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing であり、「semantic kind=activity、backbone=InstructionConflictDetectionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: InstructionConflictDetectionActivity 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for InstructionConflictDetectionActivity were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: InstructionConflictDetectionActivity の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 指令冲突检测活动已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Instruction conflict-detection activity was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 指示競合検出活動は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 指令元数据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：InstructionMetadata 是与一个或多个 Instruction 关联、具有自己的来源和有效时间的信息对象，用于解释指令何时、为何、对谁以及以何种优先级生效；它不是指令内容本身。
short_definitions.en: Instruction metadata is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is information associated with one or more Instructions and carrying its own provenance and validity time.
short_definitions.ja: 指示メタデータは情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：InstructionMetadata は一つ以上の Instruction に関連し独自来歴と有効時刻を持つ情報で、いつ・なぜ・誰に・どの優先度で適用するかを説明し、指示内容自体ではありません。

definitions.zh: 指令元数据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：InstructionMetadata 是与一个或多个 Instruction 关联、具有自己的来源和有效时间的信息对象，用于解释指令何时、为何、对谁以及以何种优先级生效；它不是指令内容本身。
definitions.en: Instruction metadata is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is information associated with one or more Instructions and carrying its own provenance and validity time. It explains when, why, for whom, and at what precedence an instruction applies; it is not the directive content itself.
definitions.ja: 指示メタデータは情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：InstructionMetadata は一つ以上の Instruction に関連し独自来歴と有効時刻を持つ情報で、いつ・なぜ・誰に・どの優先度で適用するかを説明し、指示内容自体ではありません。

why_needed.zh: 指令元数据为canonical 事实 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata（Instruction has_metadata InstructionMetadata）提供明确端点并保持与 Instruction 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: instruction metadata provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata (Instruction has_metadata InstructionMetadata) while preserving its reviewed boundary from Instruction.
why_needed.ja: 指示メタデータはcanonical 事実 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata（Instruction has_metadata InstructionMetadata）の明確な端点を提供し、Instruction との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的指令元数据：指令元数据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：InstructionMetadata 是与一个或多个 Instruction 关联、具有自己的来源和有效时间的信息对象，用于解释指令何时、为何、对谁以及以何种优先级生效；它不是指令内容本身。；该种差可由关系 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes instruction metadata records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Instruction metadata is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is information associated with one or more Instructions and carrying its own provenance and validity time. It explains when, why, for whom, and at what precedence an instruction applies; it is not the directive content itself. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす指示メタデータを含みます：指示メタデータは情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：InstructionMetadata は一つ以上の Instruction に関連し独自来歴と有効時刻を持つ情報で、いつ・なぜ・誰に・どの優先度で適用するかを説明し、指示内容自体ではありません。 種差は関係 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 指令只是关系 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata 的另一端；相关联不表示它是指令元数据。
excludes.en: Instruction is only the other endpoint of Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata; relatedness does not make it a InstructionMetadata.
excludes.ja: Instruction は Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで InstructionMetadata にはなりません。

labels.ja: 指示メタデータの正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次多模态助手的上下文准备运行中，系统将指令元数据（InstructionMetadata）记录为 Instruction has_metadata InstructionMetadata 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“指令元数据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：InstructionMetadata 是与一个或多个 Instruction 关联、具有自己的来源和有效时间的信息对象，用于解释指令何时、为何、对谁以及以何种优先级生效；它不是指令内容本身”。
descriptions.en: During a multimodal assistant run for context preparation, the system records instruction metadata (InstructionMetadata) as the target of Instruction has_metadata InstructionMetadata. Its reviewed definition is “Instruction metadata is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is information associated with one or more Instructions and carrying its own provenance and validity time. It explains when, why, for whom, and at what precedence an instruction applies; it is not the directive content itself”.
descriptions.ja: マルチモーダル支援エージェントのコンテキスト準備実行では、システムは指示メタデータ（InstructionMetadata）を Instruction has_metadata InstructionMetadata の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「指示メタデータは情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：InstructionMetadata は一つ以上の Instruction に関連し独自来歴と有効時刻を持つ情報で、いつ・なぜ・誰に・どの優先度で適用するかを説明し、指示内容自体ではありません」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 InstructionMetadata 以及方向保持不变的事实 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata。
expected_result.en: The run can query InstructionMetadata together with direction-preserving fact Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata.
expected_result.ja: この実行では InstructionMetadata と方向を保持した事実 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.ja: 指示メタデータの境界例

descriptions.zh: Instruction 用作InstructionMetadata的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 Instruction 的已审查定义是“指令属于规范，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它记录约束智能体行为的规范性内容，并携带权威、作用域、优先级、来源和冲突解决元数据。”。不能因 relation Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata 而把它归入InstructionMetadata。
descriptions.en: Instruction is the boundary contrast for InstructionMetadata. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but Instruction's reviewed definition is “Instruction is a specification whose defining condition is that it records a directive that constrains agent behavior and carries authority, scope, priority, provenance, and conflict-resolution metadata.”. relation Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata does not make it a InstructionMetadata.
descriptions.ja: Instruction は InstructionMetadata の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、Instruction の審査済み定義は「指示は仕様のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、エージェントの振る舞いを制約する規範的内容を記録し、権威、適用範囲、優先度、出典、衝突解決のメタデータを持ちます。」です。relation Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata だけで InstructionMetadata にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: Instruction 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 InstructionMetadata。
expected_result.en: Instruction retains its own type; validation must not promote it to InstructionMetadata from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: Instruction は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで InstructionMetadata へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionMetadata (instruction metadata) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionMetadata（指示メタデータ）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionMetadata 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms InstructionMetadata has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は InstructionMetadata の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: InstructionMetadata 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for InstructionMetadata were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: InstructionMetadata の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 指令元数据已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: instruction metadata was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 指示メタデータは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 共享父节点对照：父节点 Instruction：InstructionMetadata（semantic kind=information，骨架 Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata）；InstructionOverride（semantic kind=specification，骨架 InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction）。双端条件：InstructionMetadata 条件：“指令元数据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：InstructionMetadata 是与一个或多个 Instruction 关联、具有自己的来源和有效时间的信息对象，用于解释指令何时、为何、对谁以及以何种优先级生效；它不是指令内容本身”；InstructionOverride 条件：“指令覆盖属于指令，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它记录更高权威或更具体作用域的指令对另一条指令的授权替换或收窄”。逐端验证；父节点不证明任一身份。
differentia.en: Shared-parent contrast: parent Instruction: InstructionMetadata (semantic kind=information, backbone Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata); InstructionOverride (semantic kind=specification, backbone InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction). Endpoint conditions: InstructionMetadata condition: “Instruction metadata is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is information associated with one or more Instructions and carrying its own provenance and validity time”; InstructionOverride condition: “Instruction override is an instruction whose defining condition is that it records an authorized replacement or narrowing of one instruction by another with higher authority or more specific scope”. Verify each endpoint; the parent proves neither identity.
differentia.ja: 共有親対照：親 Instruction：InstructionMetadata（semantic kind=information、バックボーン Instruction-has_metadata-InstructionMetadata）；InstructionOverride（semantic kind=specification、バックボーン InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction）。両端条件：InstructionMetadata の条件：「指示メタデータは情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：InstructionMetadata は一つ以上の Instruction に関連し独自来歴と有効時刻を持つ情報で、いつ・なぜ・誰に・どの優先度で適用するかを説明し、指示内容自体ではありません」；InstructionOverride の条件：「指示上書きは指示のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、より高い権威またはより具体的な範囲を持つ指示が別の指示を正当に置換または限定することを記録します」。各端を検証し、親だけでは同一性を証明しません。
