descriptions.zh: 在合成运行 has_instruction_authority-scenario-001 中，Instruction 通过“has instruction authority”明确指向 InstructionAuthority；记录保留 source→target 方向、谓词和限定条件。 审查定义：将指令连接到用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令冲突的权威来源。
descriptions.en: In synthetic run has_instruction_authority-scenario-001, Instruction explicitly has instruction authority InstructionAuthority; the assertion preserves its source-to-target direction, predicate, and qualifiers. Reviewed definition: links an instruction to the authority source used to resolve conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives.
descriptions.ja: 合成実行 has_instruction_authority-scenario-001 で、Instruction は「has instruction authority」により InstructionAuthority を明示的に指します。アサーションは source→target の方向、述語、限定条件を保持します。 審査済み定義：指示を、システム、開発者、ユーザー、ポリシー、検索内容、またはツール由来の指示間の競合を解決するために用いる権限情報源へ結び付けます。

expected_result.zh: 该对象按定义被识别为has instruction authority。
expected_result.en: The object is classified as has instruction authority under the reviewed definition.
expected_result.ja: この対象はレビュー済み定義によりhas instruction authorityとして分類されます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该例满足has instruction authority的定义边界和归属条件。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example satisfies the definition boundary and ownership conditions of has instruction authority.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例はhas instruction authorityの定義境界と所属条件を満たします。

source_claims.supports: Root object has_instruction_authority; nested object has_instruction_authority-example-positive-001 at $.examples[0]; claim key eng-spec-openai-model-2025-10-27::OpenAI Model Spec (2025-10-27) > Chain of command. Source eng-spec-openai-model-2025-10-27 applies to this nested object because its exact path and object identity bind the claim. Moonweave contextualization of root evidence; not an additional assertion by eng-spec-openai-model-2025-10-27.
source_claims.locator: OpenAI Model Spec (2025-10-27) > Chain of command

labels.en: Boundary case for has instruction authority

descriptions.zh: Instruction 与 InstructionAuthority 同时出现但没有可验证的“has instruction authority”断言；仅共现不能建立该关系。 审查定义：将指令连接到用于解决系统、开发者、用户、策略、检索内容或工具来源指令冲突的权威来源。
descriptions.en: Instruction and InstructionAuthority co-occur without a verifiable has instruction authority assertion; co-occurrence alone does not establish this relation. Reviewed definition: links an instruction to the authority source used to resolve conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives.
descriptions.ja: Instruction と InstructionAuthority は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「has instruction authority」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：指示を、システム、開発者、ユーザー、ポリシー、検索内容、またはツール由来の指示間の競合を解決するために用いる権限情報源へ結び付けます。

expected_result.zh: 验证器不得把该对象归类为has instruction authority。
expected_result.en: Validation must not classify the object as has instruction authority.
expected_result.ja: 検証器はこの対象をhas instruction authorityとして分類してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 相关性或共享上位概念不足以证明严格的概念成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: Relatedness or a shared broader concept is insufficient for strict concept membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 関連性または共通の上位概念だけでは、厳密な概念所属を証明できません。

source_claims.supports: Root object has_instruction_authority; nested object has_instruction_authority-example-boundary-001 at $.examples[1]; claim key eng-spec-openai-model-2025-10-27::OpenAI Model Spec (2025-10-27) > Chain of command. Source eng-spec-openai-model-2025-10-27 applies to this nested object because its exact path and object identity bind the claim. Moonweave contextualization of root evidence; not an additional assertion by eng-spec-openai-model-2025-10-27.
source_claims.locator: OpenAI Model Spec (2025-10-27) > Chain of command

source_claims.supports: Source eng-spec-openai-model-2025-10-27 at locator "OpenAI Model Spec (2025-10-27) > Chain of command" supports the operational notion for Relation has_instruction_authority (has instruction authority): Instruction —has_instruction_authority→ InstructionAuthority means "links an instruction to the authority source used to resolve conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives." Operationally, links an instruction to the authority source used to resolve conflicts among system, developer, user, policy, retrieved, or tool-originated directives. The canonical direction, owner info-prompts-instructions, relation kind causal, and layout role cross-link are Moonweave design inference choices; the source does not assert those ontology decisions.
source_claims.locator: OpenAI Model Spec (2025-10-27) > Chain of command

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 has_instruction_authority（has instruction authority）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms has_instruction_authority (has instruction authority) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は has_instruction_authority（has instruction authority）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 has_instruction_authority 的 predicate 为 has_instruction_authority，方向为 Instruction → InstructionAuthority，relation kind 为 causal，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 Instruction→InstructionAuthority、predicate=has_instruction_authority、relation kind=causal、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation has_instruction_authority has predicate has_instruction_authority, direction Instruction → InstructionAuthority, relation kind causal, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction Instruction->InstructionAuthority, predicate=has_instruction_authority, relation kind=causal, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 has_instruction_authority の predicate が has_instruction_authority、方向が Instruction → InstructionAuthority、relation kind が causal、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 Instruction→InstructionAuthority、predicate=has_instruction_authority、relation kind=causal、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: has_instruction_authority 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for has_instruction_authority were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: has_instruction_authority の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: v3 依据显式关系决策确认 canonical 方向与默认逻辑骨架职责。
change_note.en: v3 confirmed canonical direction and default logical-backbone responsibility from explicit relation decisions.
change_note.ja: v3 は明示的な関係判断に基づき canonical 方向と既定論理バックボーン責務を確認しました。

authority_basis.zh: Instruction 仍由 info-plane 拥有，PromptInjectionSignal 仍由 safety-plane 拥有；该 governance 事实只建立跨域依赖，不转移规范所有权。运行时授权必须由具体 PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant 或协议会话证明。
authority_basis.en: Instruction remains owned by info-plane and PromptInjectionSignal by safety-plane; this governance fact establishes a cross-Domain dependency without transferring canonical ownership. Runtime authority must be evidenced by a concrete PolicyDecision, AuthorizationGrant, or protocol session.
authority_basis.ja: Instruction は info-plane、PromptInjectionSignal は safety-plane に引き続き所有されます。この governance 事実は正規所有権を移さずドメイン横断依存だけを表し、実行時権限には具体的な PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant、またはプロトコルセッションの証拠が必要です。

protocol_or_resource_context.zh: 查询必须沿 Instruction → PromptInjectionSignal 的 canonical ID 与该关系自身的来源主张执行；协议版本、资源标识和信任判定保留在两端节点的信息合同中。
protocol_or_resource_context.en: Queries follow the canonical Instruction → PromptInjectionSignal assertion and this relation's own source claims; protocol version, resource identity, and trust decisions remain in the endpoint information contracts.
protocol_or_resource_context.ja: 問い合わせは Instruction → PromptInjectionSignal の canonical ID と当該関係固有の出典主張に従います。プロトコル版、資源識別、信頼判断は両端ノードの情報契約に保持されます。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection（instruction flagged as prompt injection）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection (instruction flagged as prompt injection) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection（instruction flagged as prompt injection）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection 的 predicate 为 instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection，方向为 Instruction → PromptInjectionSignal，relation kind 为 governance，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 Instruction→PromptInjectionSignal、predicate=instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection、relation kind=governance、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection has predicate instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection, direction Instruction → PromptInjectionSignal, relation kind governance, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction Instruction->PromptInjectionSignal, predicate=instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection, relation kind=governance, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection の predicate が instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection、方向が Instruction → PromptInjectionSignal、relation kind が governance、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 Instruction→PromptInjectionSignal、predicate=instruction_flagged_as_prompt_injection、relation kind=governance、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

descriptions.zh: InstructionApplicability 与 InstructionMetadata 同时出现但没有可验证的“是一种”断言；仅共现不能建立该关系。 审查定义：指令适用性 是一种 指令元数据。区分特征：任一指令适用性对象都是说明指令在何条件下生效或失效的 InstructionMetadata。
descriptions.en: InstructionApplicability and InstructionMetadata co-occur without a verifiable is a assertion; co-occurrence alone does not establish this relation. Reviewed definition: instruction applicability is a kind of instruction metadata. Reviewed differentia: Every InstructionApplicability object is InstructionMetadata stating the conditions under which an instruction is active or inactive.
descriptions.ja: InstructionApplicability と InstructionMetadata は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「の一種である」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：指示適用性 は 指示メタデータ の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての InstructionApplicability は指示が有効／無効となる条件を示す InstructionMetadata です。

expected_result.zh: 验证器不得把该对象归类为是一种。

expected_result.ja: 検証器はこの対象をの一種であるとして分類してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 関連性または共通の上位概念だけでは、厳密な概念所属を証明できません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata（是一种）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata (is a) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata（の一種である）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 InstructionApplicability → InstructionMetadata，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 secondary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 InstructionApplicability→InstructionMetadata、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=secondary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata has predicate is_a, direction InstructionApplicability → InstructionMetadata, relation kind hierarchy, layout role secondary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction InstructionApplicability->InstructionMetadata, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=secondary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata の predicate が is_a、方向が InstructionApplicability → InstructionMetadata、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が secondary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 InstructionApplicability→InstructionMetadata、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=secondary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: InstructionApplicability-is_a-InstructionMetadata の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: v3 依据显式关系决策确认 canonical 方向与默认逻辑骨架职责。
change_note.en: v3 confirmed canonical direction and default logical-backbone responsibility from explicit relation decisions.
change_note.ja: v3 は明示的な関係判断に基づき canonical 方向と既定論理バックボーン責務を確認しました。

definitions.zh: 冲突检测活动引用安全域拥有的指令冲突记录，不复制其身份。
definitions.en: Conflict detection references the safety-owned instruction-conflict record without duplicating its identity.
definitions.ja: 競合検出は安全領域所有の指示競合記録を参照し、その同一性を複製しません。

cardinality_not_applicable_reason.zh: 该语义事实不对所有运行实例施加统一基数。

cardinality_not_applicable_reason.ja: この意味事実はすべての実行インスタンスに一律の基数を課しません。

authority_basis.zh: 指令冲突检测活动仍由 info-prompts-instructions 唯一拥有，指令冲突仍由 safety-injection-defense 唯一拥有；detects 只建立跨域事实，不转移定义权。若该事实触发运行操作，还必须引用适用的 PolicyDecision 或 AuthorizationGrant。
authority_basis.en: Instruction conflict-detection activity remains uniquely owned by info-prompts-instructions and instruction conflict by safety-injection-defense; detects establishes a cross-Domain fact without transferring definitional ownership. If the fact triggers a runtime operation, it must also reference an applicable PolicyDecision or AuthorizationGrant.
authority_basis.ja: 指示競合検出活動は info-prompts-instructions、指示衝突は safety-injection-defense に引き続き一意に所有されます。detects は定義所有権を移さずドメイン横断事実だけを確立し、実行操作を起動する場合は適用される PolicyDecision または AuthorizationGrant も参照します。

Reviewed differentia: Every InstructionOverride is an Instruction that replaces or narrows another instruction through higher authority or more specific scope.
descriptions.ja: InstructionOverride と Instruction は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「の一種である」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：指示上書き は 指示 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての InstructionOverride はより高い権限または具体的範囲で別指示を置換・狭小化する Instruction です。

distinct_fact_rationale.zh: is_a 给出 InstructionOverride 的概念归属；overrides 指向被遮蔽的另一条 Instruction，是独立的操作事实。
distinct_fact_rationale.en: is_a classifies InstructionOverride, while overrides points to the other Instruction whose effect is displaced; these are independent facts.
distinct_fact_rationale.ja: is_a は InstructionOverride の概念所属を示し、overrides は効力を置き換えられる別の Instruction を指す独立した操作事実です。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction（是一种）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction (is a) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction（の一種である）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 InstructionOverride → Instruction，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 InstructionOverride→Instruction、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction has predicate is_a, direction InstructionOverride → Instruction, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction InstructionOverride->Instruction, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction の predicate が is_a、方向が InstructionOverride → Instruction、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 InstructionOverride→Instruction、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: InstructionOverride-is_a-Instruction の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.ja: v3 は明示的な関係判断に基づき canonical 方向と既定論理バックボーン責務を確認しました。

Reviewed definition: An authorized override explicitly identifies the instruction it replaces or narrows.

labels.zh: overrides_instruction 到 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction 的迁移正例
labels.en: Positive migration example from overrides_instruction to InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction
labels.ja: overrides_instruction から InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction への移行正例

descriptions.zh: 旧谓词 overrides_instruction 的迁移含义是“将获授权的指令覆盖连接到它所替换或限制的较低优先级或较窄范围指令。”它不创建第二条边；在统一图中，InstructionOverride 与 Instruction 之间的事实仅由 canonical 关系 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction 表达，并保留 source→target 方向与限定条件。Canonical 审查定义：授权的覆盖指令明确指向被替换或收窄的原指令。
descriptions.en: The migrated overrides_instruction meaning is “links an authorized instruction override to the lower-priority or narrower instruction it replaces or limits.” It does not create a second edge: in the unified graph, the fact between InstructionOverride and Instruction is represented only by canonical relation InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction, preserving source-to-target direction and qualifiers. Canonical reviewed definition: An authorized override explicitly identifies the instruction it replaces or narrows.
descriptions.ja: 旧述語 overrides_instruction の移行時の意味は「認可された指示上書きを、それが置換または制限する低優先度あるいは狭い範囲の指示へ結び付けます。」です。第2の辺は作成せず、統一グラフでは InstructionOverride と Instruction の事実を canonical 関係 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction だけで表し、source→target の方向と限定条件を保持します。Canonical 審査済み定義：認可済み上書き指示は置換または狭小化する元指示を明示します。

expected_result.zh: 查询只解析到 canonical 关系 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction；不存在独立的 overrides_instruction 边。
expected_result.en: The query resolves only canonical relation InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction; no independent overrides_instruction edge exists.
expected_result.ja: 照会は canonical 関係 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction だけを解決し、独立した overrides_instruction 辺は存在しません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该例把旧术语 overrides_instruction 作为 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction 的边内迁移说明，节点和关系事实仍只有一套。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example keeps legacy term overrides_instruction as migration information on InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction; nodes and relation facts remain single-source.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は旧用語 overrides_instruction を InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction 上の移行情报として保持し、ノードと関係事実を一系統に保ちます。

Source eng-spec-openai-model-2025-10-27 applies to this nested object because its exact path and object identity bind the claim. labels.zh: overrides_instruction 到 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction 的迁移边界例
labels.en: Migration boundary from overrides_instruction to InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction
labels.ja: overrides_instruction から InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction への移行境界例

descriptions.zh: InstructionOverride 与 Instruction 的共现既不能建立 canonical 关系 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction，也不能恢复已合并的旧谓词 overrides_instruction；只有满足“将获授权的指令覆盖连接到它所替换或限制的较低优先级或较窄范围指令。”且可验证的断言才成立。Canonical 审查定义：授权的覆盖指令明确指向被替换或收窄的原指令。
descriptions.en: Co-occurrence of InstructionOverride and Instruction establishes neither canonical relation InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction nor a revived overrides_instruction edge; only a verifiable assertion satisfying “links an authorized instruction override to the lower-priority or narrower instruction it replaces or limits.” is valid. Canonical reviewed definition: An authorized override explicitly identifies the instruction it replaces or narrows.
descriptions.ja: InstructionOverride と Instruction の共起だけでは canonical 関係 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction も、統合済みの旧述語 overrides_instruction の復活も成立しません。「認可された指示上書きを、それが置換または制限する低優先度あるいは狭い範囲の指示へ結び付けます。」を満たす検証可能なアサーションだけが有効です。Canonical 審査済み定義：認可済み上書き指示は置換または狭小化する元指示を明示します。

expected_result.zh: 验证拒绝仅凭共现建立 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction，并保持 overrides_instruction 为已合并的迁移标识。
expected_result.en: Validation rejects inferring InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction from co-occurrence and keeps overrides_instruction as a merged migration identifier.
expected_result.ja: 検証は共起だけから InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction を推論することを拒否し、overrides_instruction を統合済みの移行識別子として保持します。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该例同时防止从共现推断 InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction，以及把 overrides_instruction 复活成平行边。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example prevents both inferring InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction from co-occurrence and reviving overrides_instruction as a parallel edge.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は、共起から InstructionOverride-overrides-Instruction を推論することと、overrides_instruction を並行辺として復活させることの両方を防ぎます。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InstructionParsingActivity-consumes-PromptTemplateInstance（consumes）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionParsingActivity-consumes-PromptTemplateInstance (consumes) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionParsingActivity-consumes-PromptTemplateInstance（consumes）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionParsingActivity-consumes-PromptTemplateInstance 的 predicate 为 consumes，方向为 InstructionParsingActivity → PromptTemplateInstance，relation kind 为 information，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 InstructionParsingActivity→PromptTemplateInstance、predicate=consumes、relation kind=information、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation InstructionParsingActivity-consumes-PromptTemplateInstance has predicate consumes, direction InstructionParsingActivity → PromptTemplateInstance, relation kind information, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction InstructionParsingActivity->PromptTemplateInstance, predicate=consumes, relation kind=information, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 InstructionParsingActivity-consumes-PromptTemplateInstance の predicate が consumes、方向が InstructionParsingActivity → PromptTemplateInstance、relation kind が information、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 InstructionParsingActivity→PromptTemplateInstance、predicate=consumes、relation kind=information、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InstructionProcessing-has_phase-InstructionParsingActivity（has phase）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionProcessing-has_phase-InstructionParsingActivity (has phase) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionProcessing-has_phase-InstructionParsingActivity（has phase）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionProcessing-has_phase-InstructionParsingActivity 的 predicate 为 has_phase，方向为 InstructionProcessing → InstructionParsingActivity，relation kind 为 temporal，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 InstructionProcessing→InstructionParsingActivity、predicate=has_phase、relation kind=temporal、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation InstructionProcessing-has_phase-InstructionParsingActivity has predicate has_phase, direction InstructionProcessing → InstructionParsingActivity, relation kind temporal, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction InstructionProcessing->InstructionParsingActivity, predicate=has_phase, relation kind=temporal, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 InstructionProcessing-has_phase-InstructionParsingActivity の predicate が has_phase、方向が InstructionProcessing → InstructionParsingActivity、relation kind が temporal、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 InstructionProcessing→InstructionParsingActivity、predicate=has_phase、relation kind=temporal、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

Reviewed differentia: Every InstructionProvenance object is InstructionMetadata linking an instruction to a message, policy, template, or approval record.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InstructionProvenance-is_a-InstructionMetadata（是一种）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionProvenance-is_a-InstructionMetadata (is a) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionProvenance-is_a-InstructionMetadata（の一種である）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionProvenance-is_a-InstructionMetadata 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 InstructionProvenance → InstructionMetadata，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 secondary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 InstructionProvenance→InstructionMetadata、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=secondary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation InstructionProvenance-is_a-InstructionMetadata has predicate is_a, direction InstructionProvenance → InstructionMetadata, relation kind hierarchy, layout role secondary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction InstructionProvenance->InstructionMetadata, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=secondary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 InstructionProvenance-is_a-InstructionMetadata の predicate が is_a、方向が InstructionProvenance → InstructionMetadata、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が secondary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 InstructionProvenance→InstructionMetadata、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=secondary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

definitions.zh: 指令解决结果以非动作关系记录冲突处理后仍然有效的指令，并保留优先级、权限、作用域、覆盖或升级理由。
definitions.en: An instruction-resolution result records through a non-action relation the instructions that remain effective after conflict handling, together with priority, authority, scope, override, or escalation rationale.
definitions.ja: 指示解決結果は非動作関係により、競合処理後も有効な指示と、優先度・権限・範囲・上書き・上位判断の理由を記録します。

authority_basis.zh: InstructionResolution 仍由 info-plane 拥有，InstructionConflict 仍由 safety-plane 拥有；该 governance 事实只建立跨域依赖，不转移规范所有权。运行时授权必须由具体 PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant 或协议会话证明。
authority_basis.en: InstructionResolution remains owned by info-plane and InstructionConflict by safety-plane; this governance fact establishes a cross-Domain dependency without transferring canonical ownership. Runtime authority must be evidenced by a concrete PolicyDecision, AuthorizationGrant, or protocol session.
authority_basis.ja: InstructionResolution は info-plane、InstructionConflict は safety-plane に引き続き所有されます。この governance 事実は正規所有権を移さずドメイン横断依存だけを表し、実行時権限には具体的な PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant、またはプロトコルセッションの証拠が必要です。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InstructionResolutionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing（is a）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionResolutionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing (is a) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionResolutionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing（is a）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionResolutionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 InstructionResolutionActivity → InstructionProcessing，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 InstructionResolutionActivity→InstructionProcessing、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation InstructionResolutionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing has predicate is_a, direction InstructionResolutionActivity → InstructionProcessing, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction InstructionResolutionActivity->InstructionProcessing, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 InstructionResolutionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing の predicate が is_a、方向が InstructionResolutionActivity → InstructionProcessing、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 InstructionResolutionActivity→InstructionProcessing、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: InstructionResolutionActivity-is_a-InstructionProcessing 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InstructionResolutionActivity-produces-InstructionResolution（produces）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionResolutionActivity-produces-InstructionResolution (produces) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionResolutionActivity-produces-InstructionResolution（produces）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionResolutionActivity-produces-InstructionResolution 的 predicate 为 produces，方向为 InstructionResolutionActivity → InstructionResolution，relation kind 为 causal，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 InstructionResolutionActivity→InstructionResolution、predicate=produces、relation kind=causal、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。

decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 InstructionResolutionActivity-produces-InstructionResolution の predicate が produces、方向が InstructionResolutionActivity → InstructionResolution、relation kind が causal、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 InstructionResolutionActivity→InstructionResolution、predicate=produces、relation kind=causal、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

definitions.zh: 指令解决活动依据可追溯的优先级、权限、作用域和覆盖规则解决一项指令冲突；解决结果另由 InstructionResolutionActivity-produces-InstructionResolution 记录。

authority_basis.en: Instruction resolution activity remains uniquely owned by info-prompts-instructions and instruction conflict by safety-injection-defense; resolves establishes a cross-Domain fact without transferring definitional ownership. If the fact triggers a runtime operation, it must also reference an applicable PolicyDecision or AuthorizationGrant.

decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InstructionScope-is_a-InstructionMetadata (is a) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InstructionScope-is_a-InstructionMetadata（の一種である）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InstructionScope-is_a-InstructionMetadata 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 InstructionScope → InstructionMetadata，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 secondary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 InstructionScope→InstructionMetadata、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=secondary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation InstructionScope-is_a-InstructionMetadata has predicate is_a, direction InstructionScope → InstructionMetadata, relation kind hierarchy, layout role secondary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction InstructionScope->InstructionMetadata, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=secondary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 InstructionScope-is_a-InstructionMetadata の predicate が is_a、方向が InstructionScope → InstructionMetadata、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が secondary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 InstructionScope→InstructionMetadata、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=secondary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

descriptions.zh: 在合成运行 PromptTemplate-is_a-PromptDefinition-scenario-001 中，PromptTemplate 通过“是一种”明确指向 PromptDefinition；记录保留 source→target 方向、谓词和限定条件。 审查定义：提示模板 是一种 提示定义。区分特征：模板是静态 PromptDefinition 的一种，不属于运行时调用模块；实例化活动通过关系使用它。
descriptions.en: In synthetic run PromptTemplate-is_a-PromptDefinition-scenario-001, PromptTemplate explicitly is a PromptDefinition; the assertion preserves its source-to-target direction, predicate, and qualifiers. decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 SystemPrompt-is_a-Instruction（是一种）由 info-prompts-instructions 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由提示模板或实例化关系，或由指令的规范作用、权威、优先级与作用域决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms SystemPrompt-is_a-Instruction (is a) is owned by info-prompts-instructions for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a prompt template or instantiation relation, or by an instruction's normative effect, authority, priority, and scope.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は SystemPrompt-is_a-Instruction（の一種である）を info-prompts-instructions が「対象の同一性がプロンプトテンプレートやインスタンス化関係、または指示の規範作用、権威、優先度、作用域で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 SystemPrompt-is_a-Instruction 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 SystemPrompt → Instruction，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 SystemPrompt→Instruction、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation SystemPrompt-is_a-Instruction has predicate is_a, direction SystemPrompt → Instruction, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction SystemPrompt->Instruction, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 SystemPrompt-is_a-Instruction の predicate が is_a、方向が SystemPrompt → Instruction、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 SystemPrompt→Instruction、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: SystemPrompt-is_a-Instruction 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for SystemPrompt-is_a-Instruction were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: SystemPrompt-is_a-Instruction の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。
